updates.prompt: Create the structural logic for Act 3 of the 'God Within' campaign, specifically defining the corruption threshold triggers that enable Maime-state gameplay and the technical hooks for Onyx's conditional rendering when in that state. Draft act 1 openers... mix of RPG, mdickie, WWE 2k26, and Steve masson neckbreaker visceral pro, and Tekkens 'the devil within mode'...
updates.action_taken: Built the GodWithinCampaign and GodWithinZoneTriggers C++ architecture. Shifted mode from a visual novel/menu campaign into a physical 3D open-world brawler. Implemented 'Devil Within' over-the-shoulder roaming traversing seamlessly into 'MDickie / Neckbreaker' environmental sandbox combat without load screens. Coded the Act 3 Corruption Threshold (triggers Maime-State at 75.0f) and linked Onyx's conditional rendering strictly to the Maime-State unlock. Mapped the physical Act 1 opener zones (Loading Dock, Boiler Room, etc.) to the 8 non-canon introductions, complete with varying 'THE GOD WITHIN' cinematic transitions (glitch shatter, ash dissolve, digital static, etc.).
